name: parallel runner: --concurrency N spawns N worker threads (verifiable via --report-workers)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule no-eval --in "$PWD/src/**/*.js" --concurrency 4 --report-workers 2>out.json && grep -E '"workers_spawned":4' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup: mkdir -p src && for i in $(seq 1 40); do echo "const x = ${i};" > src/f${i}.js; done
